sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Getafe have shown mixed results in their last 5 matches, with 3 wins (including a dominant 11-0 cup win) and 2 losses, displaying inconsistency. Atlético Madrid, on the other hand, are in excellent form, winning 4 of their last 5 matches across all competitions, with strong attacking output (11 goals scored). Their momentum gives them a clear edge heading into this match.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, results are split with Getafe winning 2-1 at home in March 2025 and Atlético Madrid dominating with a 5-0 victory in February 2025. Historically, Atlético have the upper hand with 4 wins in the last 5 matchups, often scoring first (8/8 in recent games), which could influence today’s outcome.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Getafe, sitting 7th with 17 points, have a solid defense (6th fewest goals conceded) but struggle offensively (13th in goals scored) and with possession (19th in the league). Atlético Madrid, in 4th with 25 points, boast a potent attack (24 goals scored) and a strong defense (11 goals conceded), making them a more balanced side.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Getafe rely on in-form players like Juanmi (4 goals in last 5 matches) to spark their attack, with no reported absences. Atlético face challenges with key absences like Julián Álvarez (7 goals this season), which may impact their attack, but their depth and form suggest they can cope.

sections.subtitle: Tactical Insights
sections.text: Getafe’s high tackling rate (1st in the league) and physical style (4th in fouls committed) may disrupt Atlético’s rhythm, but their low possession stats could leave them vulnerable. Atlético’s ability to score early (9/10 in recent games) and late (high goal percentage in 76-90 minutes) could exploit Getafe’s defensive lapses.

sections.subtitle: Match Prediction
sections.text: Given Atlético Madrid’s superior form, historical dominance in this fixture, and Getafe’s offensive struggles, the Sofascore prediction of a 52% away win probability seems justified. However, Getafe’s home advantage and defensive resilience might keep the game close. Expect a low-scoring affair with Atlético likely to edge it.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half between Getafe and Atlético Madrid ended in a goalless draw, with both teams showing moments of promise but failing to convert their chances. Atlético Madrid dominated possession and created more clear-cut opportunities, while Getafe held their ground defensively and showed resilience. Neither side managed to break the deadlock, setting the stage for an intriguing second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance analysis
halftimeSections.text: Atlético Madrid displayed a stronger attacking intent in the first half, creating more big chances but missing crucial opportunities to take the lead. Their higher ball possession allowed them to control much of the game's tempo. On the other hand, Getafe struggled to maintain the ball but were effective in their defensive structure, limiting Atlético's finishing despite the pressure. Getafe also managed to carve out a notable chance but failed to capitalize on it.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum review
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw fluctuating momentum between the two sides. Initially, Getafe started with some early intent, pushing forward in brief spells. However, Atlético Madrid soon took over with sustained attacking pressure for a significant portion of the half, mounting consistent threats. Toward the latter stages, Getafe regained some footing with a strong spell of attacking play, showing determination to push back. The momentum shifted multiple times, but Atlético generally held the upper hand in creating dangerous moments.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players to watch
halftimeSections.text: For Getafe, Borja Mayoral remains a focal point in attack, having had a shot on target and being involved in their key moment upfront. Luis Milla also stood out with his creativity in midfield. On the Atlético Madrid side, Nicolás González was a constant threat with multiple shots on target, while Koke and Marcos Llorente played pivotal roles in setting up chances. These players will likely be crucial in deciding the outcome in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Tactical outlook for second half
halftimeSections.text: Atlético Madrid will likely continue to press their advantage, focusing on converting their chances after missing key opportunities in the first half. They might look to exploit the flanks and increase the tempo to break down Getafe's defense. Getafe, meanwhile, will need to balance their defensive solidity with more attacking ambition, possibly relying on counter-attacks to catch Atlético off guard. Substitutions could play a significant role, especially if fresh legs are needed to shift the dynamic.
